name: Nikita Kisan Bhilare
title: Junior QA Trainee
bio: Detail-oriented QA Professional specialized in testing web and mobile apps. Skilled in designing comprehensive test cases, tracking defects, and leveraging AI-assisted development to ensure seamless user experiences and high-quality software delivery.
about:
As a Junior QA Trainee based in Pune, I am dedicated to the pursuit of excellence in software quality. My educational foundation includes an M.Tech in Computers from TSSM Bhivarabai Sawant College and a B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering from Anantrao Pawar College.

I believe that QA is about understanding the user's journey and ensuring every interaction is meaningful. I enjoy diving deep into applications, writing test scripts, and identifying edge cases to deliver reliable software.

Beyond testing, I have hands-on experience experimenting with frontend technologies like React and building dynamic user interfaces. I am a lifelong learner, always eager to pick up new tools and methodologies.

projects.title: OrangeHRM Website Testing
projects.description: Conducted automated and manual testing of the OrangeHRM web application using Selenium WebDriver with Java. Designed and executed test cases to validate core functionalities, including user authentication, employee management, and form validations. Identified, documented, and tracked defects, ensuring timely resolution. Improved test coverage and application stability through structured testing approaches and cross-browser validation.
projects.techStack: Selenium WebDriver, Java, Manual Testing, Bug Tracking, Cross-Browser Testing

projects.title: MilkApp Manual & Automation Testing
projects.description: Performed both manual and automated testing of the MilkApp application. Designed and executed test cases for key modules such as user registration, order management, and payment workflows. Automated test scenarios using Selenium WebDriver with Java to improve efficiency. Identified, reported, and tracked defects, ensuring high-quality application delivery.
projects.techStack: Manual Testing, Selenium WebDriver, Java, Bug Tracking

projects.title: SocietyApp – Residential Society Management System
projects.description: Developed a full-stack Residential Society Management System to streamline administration of housing societies, including management of societies, wings, and individual members. Built scalable frontend and backend modules using modern development practices, with support for CRUD operations, role-based access, and structured data handling. Leveraged AI-assisted development (vibe coding) to accelerate implementation.

experience.description: Working as a Junior QA Trainee, contributing to software quality and ensuring seamless user experiences.
points: Running and maintaining regression tests for web applications
Executing manual test cases and logging detailed defects
Writing test scripts and test cases for software modules
Collaborating with the development team to isolate issues

experience.description: Contributed to front-end development by building a dynamic React-based website and collaborating closely with team members.
points: Developed and maintained a responsive React website
Collaborated with team members to design and implement project features
Improved understanding of responsive layouts and modern UI design
Participated in active coding and project structure learning

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
